description_long: This is a handheld police megaphone with a large, flared white horn and a blue cylindrical body. The word 'POLICE' is prominently printed in blue capital letters on the side of the horn. The handle is ergonomically shaped and features a coiled black cable attached to a microphone or speaker unit. The rear section houses a control panel with visible buttons and switches, likely for power and volume adjustment. The mouthpiece is compact and slightly recessed, while the front opening is wide and rimmed with a black edge for durability.
description: A blue and white police megaphone with a flared horn, ergonomic handle, and coiled cable, featuring 'POLICE' text on the side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'POLICE' text, blue body, white horn, handle, and coiled cable.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the control panel, cable attachment, and the back of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the 'POLICE' text partially visible, showing the horn and handle.
description_view_3: Front view looking directly into the horn, revealing the mouthpiece and inner contours.
attribute_mouthpiece_design: Small, circular, slightly recessed with a smooth contour and no visible cover.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Blue 'POLICE' text printed on the horn.
